#     doc.custom_working_hours_shortfall = round(total_late_hours, 2)
frappe.msgprint("Late Entry Server Script Running")

# Reset fields
doc.custom_late_entry_hours = 0
doc.custom_working_hours_shortfall = 0
doc.custom_late_deduction_amount = 0

late_exempt = frappe.db.get_value(
    "Employee",
    doc.employee,
    "custom_late_deduction_exempt"
)

if late_exempt:
    doc.custom_late_entry_calculation = "Employee is exempt from late deduction."

else:

    total_late_hours = 0
    lines = []

    attendance_list = frappe.get_all(
        "Attendance",
        filters={
            "employee": doc.employee,
            "attendance_date": ["between", [doc.start_date, doc.end_date]],
            "status": "Present",
            "late_entry": 1
        },
        fields=["attendance_date", "in_time", "shift"]
    )

    # ==========================
    # LATE ENTRY DETAILS ONLY
    # ==========================

    lines.append("Late Entry Details")
    lines.append("Date         | Late Hours")
    lines.append("--------------------------------")

    for att in attendance_list:

        if not att.shift or not att.in_time:
            continue

        try:
            shift_doc = frappe.get_doc("Shift Type", att.shift)

            if not shift_doc.start_time:
                continue

            shift_start_dt = frappe.utils.get_datetime(
                f"{att.attendance_date} {shift_doc.start_time}"
            )

            in_dt = frappe.utils.get_datetime(att.in_time)

            late_hours = frappe.utils.time_diff_in_hours(in_dt, shift_start_dt)

            if late_hours > 0:
                late_hours = round(late_hours, 2)
                total_late_hours += late_hours
                lines.append(f"{att.attendance_date} | {late_hours}")

        except:
            continue

    total_late_hours = round(total_late_hours, 2)

    lines.append("--------------------------------")
    lines.append(f"Total Late Hours : {total_late_hours}")

    # ==========================
    # SET VALUES
    # ==========================

    doc.custom_late_entry_hours = total_late_hours
    doc.custom_working_hours_shortfall = total_late_hours
    doc.custom_late_entry_calculation = "\n".join(lines)

name: FCRM Comment Update
script:
if doc.reference_doctype == "CRM Deal" and doc.reference_name:
    ts = doc.creation  # time of new comment
    frappe.db.set_value(
        "CRM Deal",
        doc.reference_name,
        "modified",
        ts,
        update_modified=False
    )

name: ISIPL HD Ticket Customization
Hd Customer Creation
script:
if not frappe.db.get_value("HD Customer", doc.customer_name):
    frappe.get_doc(dict(doctype = 'HD Customer',customer_name = doc.customer_name)).insert()
